nodes.name: Daily 9AM ET
nodes.notes: Trigger: 9:00 AM ET daily. Adjust timezone in n8n settings to America/New_York.

nodes.name: Taostats Subnet 106
nodes.notes: Fetch SN106 subnet data (emissions, registration cost, tempo)

nodes.name: Taostats Pool
nodes.notes: Fetch SN106 dTAO pool data (alpha price, TAO reserve, alpha reserve)

nodes.name: CoinGecko TAO
nodes.notes: Fetch TAO price, 24h change, market cap, volume from CoinGecko

nodes.name: CoinGecko SN106
nodes.notes: Fetch SN106 alpha token price and 24h change from CoinGecko (coin ID: liquidity-provisioning)

nodes.name: Merge Data
nodes.notes: Merge all API responses. Track which APIs failed.

nodes.name: Too Many API Failures?
nodes.notes: If more than 2 APIs failed, skip posting and notify.

parameters.name: content

nodes.name: Error: Discord Notify
nodes.notes: Notify Vew via Discord that too many APIs are down.

nodes.name: Format Tweet
nodes.notes: Format metrics into tweet. Auto-truncate if over 280 chars. Numbers formatted for readability (hint: use Space Grotesk for manual image creation).

nodes.name: DRY_RUN?
nodes.notes: If DRY_RUN=true, log to file instead of posting.

nodes.name: DRY_RUN Log
nodes.notes: Write formatted tweet + raw data to log file for review.

nodes.name: Which Posting API?
nodes.notes: Route to the configured posting API (opentweet, x_api, or outstand).

nodes.name: Post via OpenTweet
nodes.notes: Post tweet via OpenTweet API (7-day trial, then $6/mo).

nodes.name: Post via X API
nodes.notes: Post tweet via X API v2. Requires OAuth 1.0a credentials. X API Basic $200/mo.

nodes.name: Post via Outstand
nodes.notes: PLACEHOLDER: Outstand API not yet available. Update when API docs published.

nodes.name: Failure: Discord Notify
nodes.notes: Alert Vew that posting failed. Includes draft tweet for manual posting.
